site.title.context: Site name shown in title and footer

nav.menu.context: Trigger label for the site navigation menu

announcement.banner.context: Announcement banner linking to press release

home.hero.message:
Earendil crafts tools to harness AI with Pi and Lefos.
Built in the open, shaped by the humans who use them.
home.hero.context: Home page hero paragraph introducing Earendil with links to Pi, Lefos, and open source

meta.titleFormat.context: Format string for the browser tab title; {title} is replaced by the page title

aria.primaryNav.context: Aria-label for the site navigation region

aria.externalLinks.context: Aria-label for the external links group in the navigation

aria.openMenu.context: Aria-label for the menu toggle button when the menu is closed

aria.closeMenu.context: Aria-label for the menu toggle button when the menu is open

aria.changeLanguage.context: Aria-label for the language picker toggle button

aria.selectLanguage.context: Aria-label for the language picker dropdown menu

aria.appearanceLabel.context: Aria-label for the theme toggle button; {state} is the current theme name (auto/dark/light)

aria.emailAddress.context: Aria-label for the email input field on subscribe/unsubscribe forms

aria.hero.context: Aria-label for the home page hero section

aria.posts.context: Aria-label for posts listing and post detail pages
